a.description: Look up A (IPv4 address) records for a domain.

aaaa.description: Look up AAAA (IPv6 address) records for a domain.

arin.description: Look up IP address information from ARIN.

asn.description: Look up Autonomous System Number information and route validity.

bimi.description: Look up BIMI records for a domain.

blacklist.description: Check an IP address against DNS-based blacklists.

blocklist.description: Check a domain against URI and domain blocklists.

bulk.description: Run DNS lookups for a list of domains.

cert.description: Look up DNS CERT records for a domain.

cname.description: Look up CNAME records for a domain.

compliance.description: Check email compliance requirements for a domain.

deliverability.description: Check email deliverability factors for a domain.

dkim.description: Look up DKIM records or discover common DKIM selectors.

dmarc.description: Look up and analyze DMARC policy for a domain.

dmarc-generator.description: Generate a DMARC record from policy settings.

dmarc-report.description: Parse and analyze DMARC aggregate XML reports.

dns-health.description: Run a comprehensive DNS health check for a domain.

dns-propagation.description: Check DNS propagation across public resolvers.

dnskey.description: Look up DNSKEY records for a domain.

domain-health.description: Run combined DNS, mail, web, and reputation checks.

ds.description: Look up DS records for a domain.

email-extract.description: Extract email addresses from text input.

header-analyzer.description: Analyze email headers from a file or stdin.

http.description: Check HTTP connectivity and response details for a URL.

https.description: Check HTTPS connectivity and TLS certificate details.

ipseckey.description: Look up DNS IPSECKEY records for a domain or IP.

loc.description: Look up DNS LOC geographic location records.

mailflow.description: Run an end-to-end mail flow diagnostic.

mta-sts.description: Look up and validate MTA-STS policy for a domain.

mx.description: Look up MX records for a domain.

ns.description: Look up NS records for a domain.

nsec.description: Look up NSEC records for a domain.

nsec3param.description: Look up NSEC3PARAM records for a domain.

ping.description: Ping a host using ICMP echo requests.

ptr.description: Perform a reverse DNS PTR lookup for an IP address.

rrsig.description: Look up DNSSEC RRSIG records for a domain.

smtp.description: Test SMTP connectivity and STARTTLS behavior.

soa.description: Look up SOA records for a domain.

samba-browse.description: Browse SMB/Samba server metadata and shares.

spf.description: Look up and analyze SPF records for a domain.

spf-generator.description: Generate an SPF record from selected mechanisms.

srv.description: Look up SRV service records for a domain.

subnet-calc.description: Calculate subnet details from CIDR notation.

tcp.description: Check TCP port connectivity and optionally grab a banner.

tlsrpt.description: Look up SMTP TLS reporting policy for a domain.

trace.description: Trace the network route to a host.

txt.description: Look up TXT records for a domain.

whatismyip.description: Show the current public IP address.
